template.problemStatement: Scrie codul R pentru a simula 10000 observatii din distributia Laplace cu parametrii dati.
template.referenceSolution:
# Reference solution — two valid shapes shown:
# A) Inverse-CDF sampler (no VGAM needed):
rlaplace <- function(n, mu = 0, b = 1) {
  u <- runif(n) - 0.5
  mu - b * sign(u) * log(1 - 2 * abs(u))
}

# B) Same with VGAM (if installed):
# library(VGAM)
# rlaplace_vgam <- function(n, mu, b) VGAM::rlaplace(n, location = mu, scale = b)

n <- 10000
mu <- 0
par(mfrow = c(2, 2))
for (b in c(0.5, 1, 2, 4)) {
  x <- rlaplace(n, mu, b)
  hist(x, breaks = 60, freq = FALSE, main = paste("Laplace mu=0, b=", b))
  # Theoretical PDF overlay:
  xs <- seq(min(x), max(x), length.out = 400)
  ys <- (1 / (2 * b)) * exp(-abs(xs - mu) / b)
  lines(xs, ys, col = "red", lwd = 2)
}

attempts.label: known-good
attempts.userAttempt:
library(VGAM)
n <- 10000
for (b in c(0.5, 1, 2, 4)) {
  x <- rlaplace(n, location = 0, scale = b)
  hist(x, breaks = 60, freq = FALSE, main = paste('Laplace b =', b), xlab = 'x')
  curve(dlaplace(x, location = 0, scale = b), add = TRUE, col = 'red', lwd = 2)
}

attempts.label: known-bad
attempts.userAttempt:
n <- 10000
x <- rnorm(n, mean = 0, sd = 1)
hist(x, main = 'samples')
